prestazioni: Engine: B18B1 (1.8L DOHC non-VTEC) with a forged internals build featuring Eagle H-beam connecting rods, JE 8.5:1 compression pistons, and ACL Race Series bearings for 9,000 RPM reliability. Paired with a TODA Racing Stage 3 camshaft (264° duration, 11.5mm lift) and Supertech valve springs/retainers to handle the increased lift.

Forced Induction: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by HyTech Exhaust, feeding into a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a custom 3.5-inch downpipe with a Vibrant 1799 resonator. Intercooled via a custom front-mount intercooler (GReddy Type-R) with -10AN silicone hoses and a Koyorad aluminum radiator for heat management.

Drivetrain & Handling: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in a DA6-specific transmission case, paired with a Fidanza 8.5lb flywheel and a South Bend Stage 2 Clutch. Suspension overhaul includes Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (DA6-specific valving), Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear), and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set). Braking upgraded to Endless CC-R6 rotors (280mm front, 260mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and stainless steel braided lines.
estetica: Exterior: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (DA6-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Seibon carbon fiber hood (Type-R style) and a J's Racing rear diffuser. Front bumper lip replaced with a Mugen Type R replica (polyurethane), and side skirts from the same kit. Paint: PPG Concept Vibrance in 'Championship White' (NH-0) with a 3-stage wet sand and polish finish.

Wheels & Stance: Work Meister S1 3P 15x8 +38 front and 15x9 +38 rear (DA6-specific offsets), wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (195/50/15 front, 225/45/15 rear). Custom fender rolling with a 1-inch spacer in the rear to achieve a flush fitment. Lug nuts: Project Kics R40 in titanium silver.

Interior: Bride Zeta III seats (DA6-specific mounting brackets) with Takata 4-point harnesses, wrapped in custom Alcantara (color-matched to the exterior). Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm) with a NRG quick-release hub. Gauges: Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, boost, water temp, and AFR) mounted in a custom A-pillar pod. Shift knob: Mugen aluminum (short throw) with a custom leather boot.
